lemmas.body: (h : n = x) → (count n xs).succ = count n (n :: xs)
lemmas.conclusion: n = x → (count n xs).succ = count n (x :: xs)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (x : ℕ) (h : n = x) (h1 : (count n xs).succ = count n (n :: xs)) : n = x → (count n xs).succ = count n (x :: xs)

lemmas.conclusion: n = x → (count n xs).succ = count n (x :: xs)
lemmas.statement: (n : ℕ) (x : ℕ) : n = x → (count n xs).succ = count n (x :: xs)
